title: About Me
content: I am an undergraduate from the University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, Beijing, now pursuing a Bachelor’s Degree in Electronic Information Engineering (minor Physics). Apart from my majors, I am also interested in Competitive Programming and have essential competence in coding (prefer programming language: C/C++/Python). The areas of research I am interested in is: Analog (Mixed Signal) Circuits Design, Radio-Frequency Circuits Design. I am currently seeking potential scientific research projects regarding Circuits Design. My Portrait EducationBSc in Electronic Information EngineeringUniversity of Chinese Academy of Sciences, 2021.9 - nowAccumulative GPA: 3.99/4.00 (Rank 1/19)Major GPA: 4.00/4.00Minor: Physics ExperiencesSummer Project in Institute of Semiconductors, Chinese Academy of Sciences, 2023.7 - 2023.9 (estimated)Designed a Low-Voltage Bandgap Reference for optical communication circuits using Cadence Virtuoso & Mentor Calibre upon GlobalFoundries 45spclo SOI process (without taping-out).Tutor: Nan Qi Semester Project in Aerospace Information Research Institute, Chinese Academy of Sciences, 2022.12 - 2023.4Investigated in self-supervised learning, multi-task shared learning, and small-sample continuous learning driven by remote sensing characteristics. Learned programming skills with Python via handling MNIST dataset.Tutor: Xian Sun Student Coach of Algorithm Association at University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, 2023.7 - 2024.7 (estimated)Organized weekly, winter and summer training sessions.Established an Online-Judge System at University of Chinese Academy of Sciences. Leader of New Media Group, Student Union of Chinese Academy of Sciences, 2022.7 - 2023.7Managed content publishing for new media platform of Student Union of Chinese Academy of Sciences. Honors2023 Mathematical Contest In Modeling, Finalist (Top 3%)2022 China Collegiate Programming Contest, Guangzhou Site, Gold Medal2021 The 46th ICPC Asia Regional Contest Jinan, Gold Medal ContactSchool Email Address: xuyizhou21 [at] mails [dot] ucas [dot] ac [dot] cnPersonal Email Address: chn_xuyizhou [at] outlook [dot] comGitHub Repository: EgoGreenalCodeForces Account: X_o_rCodeChef Account: X_o_r3
